data.title: Permuta Pushes Back on AI Coding Hype: "You Can't Prompt Your Way Out of Enterprise Complexity"
data.description: Today, a new white paper titled "You Can't Prompt Your Way Out of Enterprise Complexity" was launched by Permuta Technologies in Washington on March 25, 2026. The paper challenges assertions that AI-driven coding tools could entirely supplant conventional software engineering practices in extensive corporate settings. The release seeks to debunk these claims and provide insights counter to this narrative, emphasizing the enduring importance of manual coding processes.

data.title: BTC struggles below $72K due to weak demand indicators: investor distribution, low whale activity, and declining network growth.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin continues to struggle to rise above $72,000, with concerns arising from investor distribution, minimal whale activity, and a decrease in network growth. These factors are contributing to uncertainty regarding the short-term future of BTC.

data.title: Argentina is preventing Polymarket's progress despite global growth due to gambling laws, user protection, and regulatory challenges.
data.description: Argentina's decision to block Polymarket despite its global expansion can be attributed to its stringent gambling laws and concerns about user protection. The country is facing regulatory pressure when it comes to prediction markets, leading to the exclusion of platforms like Polymarket. The move comes as a surprise given Polymarket's impressive growth numbers, which have seen it gain traction internationally. However, Argentina's prioritization of enforcing gambling regulations and safeguarding users has taken precedence over allowing the platform to operate within its borders. This decision showcases the government's commitment to upholding strict regulations in the face of the growing popularity of prediction markets.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Kane County Economic Development Corporation Appoints Michael Cassa as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: The Kane County Economic Development Corporation (KCEDC) has appointed Michael Cassa as the new Chief Executive Officer to lead the countywide strategies. Cassa, a seasoned economic development leader, will focus on strengthening site readiness and expanding investments and partnerships across Kane County's 29 municipalities. This move comes after multiple revisions and the updated release aims to bring a fresh approach to economic development in the region.

data.title: HTTP Got TLS. APIs Got OAuth. MCP Got Nothing. Permit.io Launches the Gateway to Fix That.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, AI agents are currently operational, performing tasks such as querying CRMs, reading codebases, writing to data warehouses, and linking tool calls across critical systems via MCP. Despite this advanced functionality, a significant challenge exists for security and compliance teams as there is a lack of standard authorization processes for regulating agent activities, monitoring delegated authority, and auditing post-activity events. This deficiency is leading to tangible negative consequences. OWASP has categorized Shadow MCP Server as per the latest reports.

data.title: IKRAA CAVIAR Introduces Luxury Caviar Cart Experience for Private Events
data.description: A boutique caviar company called IKRAA CAVIAR has recently introduced a novel offering known as the Caviar Cart, providing a blend of modern luxury and interactive tasting to exclusive events nationwide in the United States. The company, spearheaded by Anna Dozortsev and her husband Arty, aims to redefine the caviar experience for customers seeking a unique and upscale touch.

data.title: NEW Smirnoff Ice Icy Island Just Crashed Beach Destinations with Reality TV's Hottest Stars -- and Tropical Flavor in Tow
data.description: A well-known brand renowned for its exciting flavors and enjoyment has selected Nic Vansteenberghe, Jeremiah Brown, and Iris Kendall to curate a series of tropical activities. These experiences will range from complimentary spray tans to special birthday parties, aiming to jump-start the summer season in style. The event is set to take place in New York on March 25, 2026. Smirnoff Ice is set to offer an unforgettable summer experience.

data.title: Tom Lee Says 'Wars Are Good For U.S. Markets' And Bets $6.8B On Ethereum To Prove It
data.description: Bitmine (NYSE: BMNR) has introduced MAVAN, an institutional platform for Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) staking, backed by a significant $6.8 billion in staked ETH by Chairman Tom Lee. Lee supports his theory that "wars benefit the U.S. economy and stock market," stating that historical data reflects markets tend to hit bottom early in conflicts, presenting investment opportunities for those looking beyond immediate crisis. Despite short-term setbacks and uncertainties from wars, Lee believes in positive long-term impacts on the economy and stock market. Lee's strategy emphasizes seizing opportunities amidst crisis, as markets often react unexpectedly during tumultuous times. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Romance Scams Are Rising and Credit Unions Play a Critical Role in Prevention
data.description: Kevin King, Vice President and IT Information Security Officer at Members 1st Federal Credit Union in ENOLA, Pennsylvania, revealed on March 25, 2026, that romance scams have evolved into a year-round danger, increasing in magnitude, complexity, and consequences. The growing number of individuals affected by this trend highlights the urgent need for heightened awareness and proactive measures to combat this ongoing threat.
